name: GaugeFlow Gate A9 source-weighted joint atom-type substrate v1
objective: Repair the source-endpoint posterior undercoverage remaining after A8 by using a fixed source-weighted DFM time distribution, while holding the explicit-time backbone, absorbing discrete path, count latent, constrained sampler, capacity, seed budget and thresholds fixed.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: A/A1/A2/A3/A4/A5/A6/A7/A8 reports, thresholds, splits, checkpoints and conclusions remain immutable. A9 is a new, fixed time-weighted DFM type-only protocol.

gate_a8: A8 corrected a real time-input defect and raised site atom accuracy from 0.40625 to 0.59375, while exact graph composition and decoded composition remained 1.0.

The remaining final training masked-top1 accuracy was 0.5. With four atoms, uniform path-time training encounters a completely masked type set with probability integral_0^1 (1-t)^4 dt = 0.2, yet sampling starts exactly there.

For t=U^2 with U uniform, t follows Beta(1/2,1); the corresponding all-mask expectation is Beta(1/2,5)/Beta(1/2,1) = 128/315 approximately 0.406. This increases source-state coverage without changing the endpoint-posterior optimum at any t>0.

literature.citation: Gat et al., Discrete Flow Matching, 2024
literature.use: The probability path and scheduler are central to discrete flow matching. A9 changes only the positive-density time weighting used to train the same endpoint posterior and sampler.

literature.citation: Lipman et al., Flow Matching for Generative Modeling, 2023
literature.use: Reweighting time samples changes optimization emphasis but preserves the pointwise conditional flow target wherever the weighting has nonzero density.

joint_type_set.chemical_vocabulary: all 119 chemical elements; the DFM mask is internal and cannot occur in a composition count
joint_type_set.composition_latent: retain A7's generated graph-level 119-element count latent and exact total-count constrained decoder
joint_type_set.node_transition: retain A6-A8's absorbing discrete endpoint posterior and count-constrained reveal matching
joint_type_set.architecture: retain A8's explicit time injection into every original-injection node state

endpoint_id_type_substrate.condition: two-class endpoint ID only; no tensor, orbit, oracle, target CIF, target lattice, target composition or target symmetry is passed as a condition
endpoint_id_type_substrate.note: True coordinates and lattice remain fixed solely for type-only qualification, exactly as in A4-A8.

decision_rules.pass: The type-set substrate is qualified only. Propose a separate versioned geometry-only repair; do not start tensor conditioning or joint crystal generation.
decision_rules.composition_pass_site_fail: The source posterior is now explicitly weighted. Audit periodic site-assignment identifiability or the atom-type structural representation before any tensor work; do not relax criteria or extend the budget.
decision_rules.composition_fail: Audit graph-level condition access and count-posterior capacity. Do not return to independent per-node type sampling or target-specific vocabularies.
